description: Federal rulemaking and policy intelligence recipes for Federal Register search, Regulations.gov dockets, comments, and open comment deadlines.

novel_features.name: Federal Register search
novel_features.description: Searches FederalRegister.gov by term, agency slug, publication date, and limit with source links and legal-status caveats.

novel_features.name: Rules and proposed rules
novel_features.description: Finds recent Federal Register rules and proposed rules for a topic without requiring users to know Federal Register type codes.

novel_features.name: Regulations.gov docket lookup
novel_features.description: Fetches docket metadata from Regulations.gov v4 using a configured api.data.gov key or DEMO_KEY for smoke testing.

novel_features.name: Public comment listing
novel_features.description: Lists public comments for a docket with stable agent-ready JSON and public-field caveats.

novel_features.name: Open comment deadlines
novel_features.description: Finds Regulations.gov documents with comment deadlines from a topic, agency, and starting date.
